announcements.name: 🎉 New Update Coming Soon!
announcements.description: A big update is on the way! Stay tuned for new features, games and improvements to the Caelus platform.

announcements.name: 🛠️ Maintenance Notice
announcements.description: Scheduled maintenance will take place this weekend. Some services may be temporarily unavailable. We apologize for any inconvenience.

announcements.name: 🏆 Event: Weekend Tournament
announcements.description: Join our weekend tournament for a chance to win exclusive prizes! Open to all players. Sign up now before spots run out.

announcements.name: 📢 Welcome to Caelus v2!
announcements.description: Caelus has been updated to version 2! Enjoy the new UI, faster loading times and improved game discovery. Thank you for your continued support.
